---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## User Story
As a **[user type]**, I want **[feature description]** so that **[benefit/goal]**.

Example:
As a **resident**, I want **daily digests delivered to my email** so that **I don't miss important community updates**.

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation:
- What is the current issue or limitation?
- How does it affect users?
- Why is it important?

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Feature Category
- [ ] Telegram Integration
- [ ] AI Digest Generation
- [ ] User Management & Authentication
- [ ] Demand-Supply Marketplace
- [ ] Frontend/UI
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Database/Performance
- [ ] Security & Compliance
- [ ] DevOps/Infrastructure
- [ ] Other

## Acceptance Criteria
What must be true for this feature to be considered complete?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or files here.

## Related Issues
Link any related issues or discussions:
- Relates to #123
- Follows from #456

## Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have, no rush)
- [ ] Medium (important, should be done soon)
- [ ] High (critical, needed for Phase 1)

## Effort Estimate
- [ ] Small (1-2 days)
- [ ] Medium (3-5 days)
- [ ] Large (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Unsure

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] I have provided clear user story and acceptance criteria
- [ ] I have explained the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have specified the feature category
